rationale.R1.4: The text mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the novelty of its approach compared to existing literature on compound inference scaling.
rationale.R1.7: There are no citations provided for claims made in the text.
rationale.RX.1: The text presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty.
